next_steps: Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) for microbiology, fungal staining, AFB smear/culture, and PCP PCR
Serum cryptococcal antigen and histoplasma antigen testing
Blood cultures and mycobacterial blood cultures
Initiation of intravenous corticosteroids as an adjunct if Pneumocystis jirovecii pneumonia is strongly suspected
Lumbar puncture if mental status change persists or if cryptococcal antigen is positive
Optimize hemodynamics with fluids and consider vasopressors if refractory shock persists
